steps.title: Draw the consequence
steps.content: The previous sentence says Wordsworth's retreat to nature was an aesthetic response to industrialization and urbanization. The next sentence concludes that the poem bears the imprint of those social changes despite its peaceful natural setting.

steps.title: Choose a result signal
steps.content: A would set up a contrast, but the conclusion follows from the previous sentence. B would introduce an example rather than a result. C would merely add another point. The transition needs to show that the final claim follows from the explanation already given. The answer is D.
